symptom: mga_transaction_regression_single_node_inventory failed because probe overwrote reserved lifecycle tx1 tx2 inventory with a fresh in-memory manager
correction_summary: probe now opens database first and seeds LocalTransactionManager from durable inventory so user transactions start after tx1 bootstrap and tx2 activation

symptom: first-filespace manifest validator counted zero active_primary rows because typed catalog payloads are codec-flattened into whitespace key value tokens
correction_summary: ParseKeyValuePayload now parses whitespace separated key value tokens so durable typed payload fields are validated consistently
rerun_result: ctest -L database_lifecycle_filespace and ctest -L database_lifecycle_storage passed

symptom: first build failed because DirtyManifestOpenClassification was declared after helper functions that used it
correction_summary: moved DirtyManifestOpenClassification before dirty manifest helper functions

symptom: first build request found no target because database lifecycle tests were configured while sb_server_core was not built by the default lifecycle configuration
correction_summary: top-level lifecycle test configuration now requests sb_server_core before the server build directory is evaluated so the database_lifecycle_security target is materialized

symptom: initial direct-engine fixture attempted durable UUID generation for session UUID kind which is intentionally not a durable identity kind
correction_summary: replaced session fixture generation with stable canonical UUID literals while durable database transaction IDs remain MGA-generated

symptom: restricted-open and cluster-boundary transaction tests attempted to attach through states already refused by DBLC-007 attach admission
correction_summary: fixtures now attach in ordinary open state and then present restricted or cluster lifecycle state to transaction admission so DBLC-008 gate is tested without weakening attach admission

symptom: rejection-path assertions decoded denied execute payloads with the accepted-execute payload shape
correction_summary: split accepted execute decoding from rejection detail decoding and asserted DBLC transaction denial details correctly

symptom: initial conformance fixture attempted to read request_uuid from SessionOperationResult instead of retaining the disconnect request frame
correction_summary: fixture now retains disconnect_frame and uses its request_uuid to verify finality records
rerun_result: ctest -R database_lifecycle_detach_cleanup_conformance and required DBLC-009 labels passed

symptom: initial full route failed with PARSER_SERVER_IPC.ROUTE_ASSOCIATION_MISMATCH because the SBPS client reused the engine auth context UUID as the parser connection route UUID
correction_summary: SBPS client now keeps parser connection UUID as route identity and auth context UUID as auth/session authority token through attach and session-bound requests
rerun_result: ctest -R database_lifecycle_full_route_conformance and parser-route server-route MGA labels passed

symptom: initial no-spin CTest and aggregate conformance invoked sbmn_manager_no_spin_gate without required source path arguments
correction_summary: CTest and aggregate gate now pass project/src/manager to sbmn_manager_no_spin_gate

symptom: sb_server_restart_killed_listener_smoke failed auth context decode because the temporary auto-created database had no local password verifier store for alice
correction_summary: test fixture now seeds the hashed verifier used by sb_ipc_tester so server management restart uses engine-owned password-verifier auth instead of a bypass
rerun_result: ctest -R sb_server_restart_killed_listener_smoke and ctest -L database_lifecycle_listener passed

symptom: listener implementation packet did not explicitly define database selector binding and database isolation behavior
correction_summary: added LISTENER-DATABASE-BINDING-ISOLATION section defining one database selector per listener profile SB_DATABASE_SELECTOR SB_DATABASE_TOKEN parser worker routing boundaries and fail-closed stale selector behavior

symptom: initial label run found parser lifecycle test executables not built because only the new conformance target had been built
correction_summary: built sbp_sbsql_handoff_smoke sbp_sbsql_full_route_execution_smoke sb_server_sbsql_admission_conformance and sbsql_stream_finality_conformance before rerunning the label

symptom: listener passed dev_bootstrap_path selector to parser and server auth compared it as a raw database path causing AUTH_DATABASE_MISMATCH before credential verification
correction_summary: server auth now normalizes dev_bootstrap_path selectors before database-route comparison and the smoke routes listener to the exact temp database path

symptom: sb_listener_manager_drain_active_smoke intermittently failed because UNDRAIN could mark an active draining parser worker idle before the handed-off client process completed
correction_summary: parser pool now reaps terminal workers before undrain preserves active draining workers until active client evidence clears and records completed client sessions from all reap paths
rerun_result: ctest -R sb_listener_manager_drain_active_smoke and ctest -L database_lifecycle_listener passed

symptom: initial link failed because the new event IPC conformance target exposed static library ordering between sb_server_event_notifications and sb_server_core
correction_summary: database_lifecycle_ipc_conformance now links sb_server_event_notifications before sb_server_core so event IPC references resolve

symptom: initial SBPS reserved-flag fixture flipped a low allowed flag byte and therefore did not trigger FRAME_FLAGS_INVALID
correction_summary: test now flips a reserved high flag bit and validates FRAME_FLAGS_INVALID correctly

symptom: initial DBLC-013G label run exposed that cursor UUID lookup could return a completed fetch request before the still-open cursor owner request
correction_summary: FindServerRequestLifecycle now prefers exact request/finality/prepared matches and active or cursor_open cursor-owner records before historical cursor records

symptom: initial hosted engine health publication showed not_started because StartHostedEngine collected status after public handle close and the public ABI open did not execute storage lifecycle open
correction_summary: StartHostedEngine now executes storage OpenDatabaseFile for lifecycle activation before publishing hosted database health and the conformance test proves active health reaches hosted engine auth attach and session status
